name: Forest Green

name: Semi-Clear Matte
description: A semi matte clear. Matte clears are particularly sensitive to thickness and firing temperature.

name: Clear Bright
description: One of Laguna's most famous glazes. A dependable glossy clear that fits many claybodies.

name: Infinite Clear
description: A glossy bright clear with excellent transparency. Zinc free and gives vibrant color when used with underglazes.

name: Clear
description: A glossy bright clear base with a somewhat stiff melt that won't run onto kiln shelves. Zinc-free.

name: Fractal Cream
description: Transparent base glaze in Laguna Cone 5 Crackle series that fracture light and show off color. Lead-free, non-toxic, not dinnerware-safe due to bacterial growth risk in fractured surfaces.

description: Crackle glaze, lead-free and non-toxic. Not dinnerware-safe.

name: Lavender Filigree
description: Crystalline glaze featuring three-dimensional crystal structures. Lead-free and nontoxic. Slightly raised crystal structure not recommended for high-friction dinnerware areas.

description: Crystalline glaze with forest-inspired coloring and dimensional crystal structures. Lead-free, nontoxic.

name: Plum Blossom Green
description: Crystalline glaze producing dimensional crystal formations in green tones. Lead-free and nontoxic.

name: Fossil White
description: Texture-producing glaze inspired by Death Valley dry lake beds. Works well with most clay bodies and adheres securely. Suitable for sculptural work and decorative exterior applications.
